"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as SheetPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-dialog"
import { type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { X } from "lucide-react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const Sheet = SheetPrimitive.Root

const SheetTrigger = SheetPrimitive.Trigger

const SheetClose = SheetPrimitive.Close

const SheetPortal = SheetPrimitive.Portal

const SheetOverlay = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Overlay>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Overlay>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SheetPrimitive.Overlay
    className={tw.def([className], {
            position: "fixed",
            inset: "inset-0",
            zIndex: "z-50",
            backgroundColor: "bg-black/80",
        })}
    {...props}
    ref={ref}
  />
))
SheetOverlay.displayName = SheetPrimitive.Overlay.displayName

const sheetVariants = /**
 * @defaultVariants {
      side: "right",
    }
 */
tw.variants({
    base: {
        position: "fixed",
        zIndex: "z-50",
        gap: "gap-4",
        backgroundColor: "bg-background",
        padding: "p-6",
        boxShadow: "shadow-lg",
        transitionProperty: "transition",
        transitionTimingFunction: "ease-in-out",
        "data-[state=closed]": {
            transitionDuration: "data-[state=closed]:duration-300",
        },
        "data-[state=open]": {
            transitionDuration: "data-[state=open]:duration-500",
        },
    },
    variants: {
        side: {
            top: {
                inset: "inset-x-0",
                top: "top-0",
                borderWidth: "border-b",
            },
            bottom: {
                inset: "inset-x-0",
                bottom: "bottom-0",
                borderWidth: "border-t",
            },
            left: {
                inset: "inset-y-0",
                left: "left-0",
                height: "h-full",
                width: "w-3/4",
                borderWidth: "border-r",
                sm: {
                    maxWidth: "sm:max-w-sm",
                },
            },
            right: {
                inset: "inset-y-0",
                right: "right-0",
                height: "h-full",
                width: "w-3/4",
                borderWidth: "border-l",
                sm: {
                    maxWidth: "sm:max-w-sm",
                },
            },
        },
    },
})

interface SheetContentProps
  extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Content>,
    VariantProps<typeof sheetVariants> {}

const SheetContent = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Content>,
  SheetContentProps
>(({ side = "right", className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SheetPortal>
    <SheetOverlay />
    <SheetPrimitive.Content
      ref={ref}
      className={tw.join(sheetVariants({ side }), className)}
      {...props}
    >
      <SheetPrimitive.Close className={tw.style({
                position: "absolute",
                right: "right-4",
                top: "top-4",
                borderRadius: "rounded-sm",
                opacity: "opacity-70",
                boxShadow: "ring-offset-background",
                transitionProperty: "transition-opacity",
                hover: {
                    opacity: "hover:opacity-100",
                },
                focus: {
                    outlineStyle: "focus:outline-none",
                    boxShadow: ["focus:ring-2", "focus:ring-ring", "focus:ring-offset-2"],
                },
                disabled: {
                    pointerEvents: "disabled:pointer-events-none",
                },
                "data-[state=open]": {
                    backgroundColor: "data-[state=open]:bg-secondary",
                },
            }).class()}>
        <X className={tw.style({
                    height: "h-4",
                    width: "w-4",
                }).class()} />
        <span className={tw.style({
                    display: "sr-only",
                }).class()}>Close</span>
      </SheetPrimitive.Close>
      {children}
    </SheetPrimitive.Content>
  </SheetPortal>
))
SheetContent.displayName = SheetPrimitive.Content.displayName

const SheetHeader = ({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>) => (
  <div
    className={tw.def([className], {
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "flex-col",
            margin: "space-y-2",
            textAlign: "text-center",
            sm: {
                textAlign: "sm:text-left",
            },
        })}
    {...props}
  />
)
SheetHeader.displayName = "SheetHeader"

const SheetFooter = ({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>) => (
  <div
    className={tw.def([className], {
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "flex-col-reverse",
            sm: {
                flexDirection: "sm:flex-row",
                justifyContent: "sm:justify-end",
                margin: "sm:space-x-2",
            },
        })}
    {...props}
  />
)
SheetFooter.displayName = "SheetFooter"

const SheetTitle = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Title>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Title>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SheetPrimitive.Title
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        fontSize: "text-lg",
        fontWeight: "font-semibold",
        color: "text-foreground",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
SheetTitle.displayName = SheetPrimitive.Title.displayName

const SheetDescription = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Description>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Description>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SheetPrimitive.Description
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        fontSize: "text-sm",
        color: "text-muted-foreground",
    })}
    {...props}
  />
))
SheetDescription.displayName = SheetPrimitive.Description.displayName

export {
  Sheet,
  SheetPortal,
  SheetOverlay,
  SheetTrigger,
  SheetClose,
  SheetContent,
  SheetHeader,
  SheetFooter,
  SheetTitle,
  SheetDescription,
}
